_comment: Valid proxy request — reviews sub-path with product_id. Signature covers all params except signature itself, sorted alphabetically, concatenated without separator.
note: Params sorted: path_prefix, product_id, shop, timestamp. Concatenated without & separator.

_comment: Valid proxy request — JSON stats endpoint. No sub-path-specific params beyond the Shopify-injected ones.
description: Valid proxy request — aggregate stats (JSON response)

_comment: Forged request — signature was computed with wrong API secret. Use for signature_verification_failed test.
description: Forged request — wrong secret used for signature

_comment: Tampered request — attacker changed product_id after Shopify signed the request. Signature no longer matches.
note: Signature was computed for product_id=123456789, but param was changed to 999999999

_comment: Missing signature param — request has no signature at all.
Request with extra UTM params from merchant theme — all included in HMAC input. Use to verify extra params don't break verification.
description: Valid request with extra theme-injected params
note: Params sorted: path_prefix, product_id, ref, shop, timestamp, utm_source. All extra params included.

_comment: Stale timestamp — request timestamp is 600 seconds in the past. Use for stale_timestamp test when freshness check is enabled.
note: Timestamp is 600 seconds before 1700000000. With a 300-second window, this should be rejected.

_comment: Expected proxy responses for each content type. Use for response-type tests.
description: Expected response shapes by content type
